nasb.text: John said to Him, “Teacher, we saw someone casting out demons in Your name, and we tried to prevent him because he was not following us.”

esv.text: John said to him, “Teacher, we saw someone casting out demons in your name, and we tried to stop him, because he was not following us.”

cnv.text: 約翰對耶穌說：“老師，我們看見有一個人奉你的名趕鬼，就禁止他，因為他不跟從我們。”

ccb.text: 约翰对耶稣说：“老师，我们看见有人奉你的名赶鬼，就阻止他，因为他不是跟从我们的。”

csbs.text: 约翰说：“老师，我们看见一个人奉你的名驱赶鬼魔，我们就去阻止他，因为他不是跟从我们的。”
